80323199.title: Advance UK

pageprops.wikibase-shortdesc: Political party in the United Kingdom

80323199.description: Political party in the United Kingdom
80323199.extract: Advance UK is a far-right political party in the United Kingdom led by Ben Habib, the former Co-Deputy Leader of Reform UK, since it was announced under its current name in June 2025. It was registered with the Electoral Commission on 4 December 2025.
